questions.question: If you could build your dream house anywhere in the world, what would it look like inside?
If you woke up one day and you were the size of an ant, what's the first thing you'd do?
If you could invent something that doesn't exist yet, what would you make?
If your toys came to life at night, what do you think they do when you're sleeping?
If you could live inside any book or movie, which one would you pick?
If you could design your own planet, what would be on it?
If animals could go to school, what subjects do you think they'd study?
If clouds were made of something other than water, what would you want them to be made of?
If you could dream about anything tonight, what would you choose?
If you could create a new holiday, what would it celebrate and how would people celebrate it?
If you could have any superpower but could only use it to help one person, who would you help and why?
Would you rather be able to fly or breathe underwater? Why?
If you could talk to animals, which animal would you want to have a long conversation with?
If you could become invisible for one day, what would you do?
Would you rather be able to read minds or see into the future?
If you had a magic wand, what's the first thing you'd do with it?

What does happy sound like?

What color is kindness?

If you could design a new color that doesn't exist yet, what would you call it and what would it look like?
